title: cuphea calophylla var. fuscinervis
intro: Cuphea calophylla var. fuscinervis, also known as the 'Firecracker Plant', is a tropical plant species belonging to the Lythraceae family. The leaves and stems of Cuphea calophylla var. fuscinervis have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Cuphea calophylla var. fuscinervis typically involve making infusions or decoctions from the leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat various health conditions.
